success_surface: Successfully identified and filtered dates older than 30 days, copied matching rows to target sheet with formatting preserved, cleaned target sheet structure, and deleted extraneous columns.
effective_behaviors: Progressive error recovery through iterative refinement of type checking and null handling
Dynamic threshold calculation based on actual data rather than hardcoded values
Comprehensive formatting preservation when transferring cells between sheets
Target sheet pre-cleanup before population to ensure clean output structure
Explicit removal of unnecessary columns to match expected output schema
Post-execution verification of output dimensions and structure
evidence: First attempt failed with TypeError on None comparison; second attempt added isinstance() check and explicit null handling
Threshold calculated as max_date - timedelta(days=30) rather than fixed date
Copied number_format, font, alignment, and border properties when transferring cell data
Called delete_rows(2, ws_target.max_row) to clear target sheet before repopulation
Used delete_cols(26) to remove extraneous column Z from target sheet
Verified final row count and column count after save operation

memory_items.title: Defensive Date Filtering
memory_items.lesson: Always validate date column entries before comparison operations, filtering out None/NaN values explicitly
memory_items.generalization: When processing date-based criteria, check isinstance(value, datetime) before comparisons and handle empty cells gracefully

memory_items.title: Dynamic Time Thresholds
memory_items.lesson: Calculate time-based thresholds from the actual data's maximum value rather than assuming fixed reference dates
memory_items.generalization: For relative time filters (e.g., X days old), compute max date first, then derive threshold dynamically from dataset boundaries

memory_items.title: Cell Style Replication
memory_items.lesson: When copying cells between sheets, replicate not just values but also number formats, fonts, alignments, and borders
memory_items.generalization: For cross-sheet data transfer requiring formatting preservation, iterate through all style attributes and copy them explicitly per cell

memory_items.title: Target Sheet Reset Strategy
memory_items.lesson: Clear existing target sheet data (except headers) before populating to avoid duplicate or stale content
memory_items.generalization: Before writing filtered/copied data to a destination sheet, delete existing rows beyond header row to ensure idempotent results

memory_items.title: Schema Alignment Verification
memory_items.lesson: After structural modifications like column deletion, verify the output dimensions match expected format
memory_items.generalization: Validate final row/column counts post-modification against task requirements to catch unexpected side effects

edits.content:
## Trace-Derived Lessons

### Defensive Data Processing
- **Date Validation:** Always check `isinstance(cell.value, datetime)` before performing date comparisons; filter out None/NaN values explicitly
- **Null Safety:** Handle missing values in numeric/date columns before any arithmetic or comparison operations

### Dynamic Calculations
- **Relative Thresholds:** Compute time-based filters (e.g., "older than 30 days") from the dataset's maximum date rather than fixed calendar references
- **Data-Driven Boundaries:** Derive all threshold values from the actual data range discovered during inspection

### Format Preservation Protocol
- **Style Replication:** When transferring cells between worksheets, copy number_format, font, alignment, and border properties per-cell
- **Formatting Audit:** Verify critical cells retain their original formatting after write operations

### Output Cleanup Standards
- **Pre-Population Clearance:** Delete all data rows in target sheets before inserting new results (preserve headers only)
- **Schema Pruning:** Remove unnecessary columns from destination to match required output structure
- **Dimension Validation:** Confirm final row and column counts match task specifications after all modifications
